core_mechanism: strong-disorder real-space renormalization (recursive decimation of the locally largest coupling/energy scale in a strongly heterogeneous system), flowing to an infinite-disorder fixed point with universal critical exponents and activated (exponential) dynamical scaling
brief_reason: The abstract's method is the strong disorder renormalization group applied to a random-coupling system, iteratively coarse-graining it toward an infinite-disorder fixed point characterized by universal exponents and dynamical scaling in the Griffiths phases.
